SiteMCP was created on 8 April 2025, in the very early days of the Model Context Protocol(MCP). At the time, MCP was a brand-new concept, and passing documentation to AI assistants via an MCP server was one of the only practical options available. Claude

urls.title: GitHub - ryoppippi/sitemcp: Fetch an entire site and use it as an MCP Server
urls.description: Fetch an entire site and use it as an MCP Server. Contribute to ryoppippi/sitemcp development by creating an account on GitHub.
